title: Spar India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Spar India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Spar India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Floor Manager to join our dynamic team in Kanpur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Spar India:
Spar India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Inventory Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Spar India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
